nasb.text: Now the Lord said to Aaron, “Go to meet Moses in the wilderness.” So he went and met him at the mountain of God and kissed him.

esv.text: The Lord said to Aaron, “Go into the wilderness to meet Moses.” So he went and met him at the mountain of God and kissed him.

cnv.text: 耶和華對亞倫說：“你到曠野去迎接摩西。”他就去了；他在　神的山遇見了摩西，就和他親吻。

ccb.text: 耶和华对亚伦说：“你到旷野去迎接摩西。”他就在上帝的山上遇见摩西，并亲吻他。
